provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (My mom is American)

items.d: A man or woman from America is ___.
items.s: My mum is from America, so she is ___.
items.hintDe: Aus Amerika / aus den USA.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 14 (he sits there in an armchair and reads)

items.d: Grandpa likes to read in this big comfortable seat for just one.
items.s: Grandpa sits down in his big comfortable ___ and reads the newspaper.
items.hintDe: Bequemer Sitz für eine Person, oft zum Lesen.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 7 (Robert had a bed)

items.d: At night you lie down on this and close your eyes.
items.s: I go to ___ at nine o'clock every night.
items.hintDe: Hier schläfst du in der Nacht.

provenance.sbRef: WB ex 1 (H = bedside table)

items.d: This small thing is next to where you lie down at night, for your lamp.
items.s: I put my book and my lamp on the ___ next to my bed.
items.hintDe: Der kleine Tisch direkt neben deinem Bett.

provenance.sbRef: WB ex 1 (N = carpet)

items.d: This big thing covers the ground of a room, and you walk on it.
items.s: There is a big red ___ on the ground in my living room.
items.hintDe: Der bedeckt den ganzen Boden im Zimmer.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (There might be a cellar underneath it)

items.d: This dark room is under a building.
items.s: We keep old boxes down in the dark ___ under the building.
items.hintDe: Der dunkle Raum unter dem Haus.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (There's a big cellar underneath our house)

items.d: This dark room is underneath a building.
items.s: There is a big ___ underneath our building, and it is dark and cold down there.
items.hintDe: Der dunkle Raum unter dem Haus.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (The Mongolian people in Central Asia move their houses a lot)

items.d: This is a big area in the middle of the biggest land.
items.s: The Mongolian people in ___ move their homes a lot.
items.hintDe: Die Mitte des größten Erdteils.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 13 (a big table and four chairs)

items.d: You sit down on this thing, and it has a back and four legs.
items.s: Sit down on this ___ and have your dinner.
items.hintDe: Darauf setzt du dich, hat vier Beine.

provenance.sbRef: WB ex 1 (P = cooker)

items.d: You make your hot dinner on this thing in the kitchen.
items.s: Mum makes hot food on the ___ in the kitchen.
items.hintDe: Hier kocht man das warme Essen.

provenance.sbRef: SB Twins ex 1 (made of cotton); MORE Words and Phrases (My jacket is made of cotton)

items.d: This white material is good for shirts and shoes.
items.s: My white shirt is made of ___, so it is good in hot weather.
items.hintDe: Weicher, weißer Stoff für T-Shirts.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 5 (new cupboards for my books); WB ex 1 (E = cupboard)

items.d: This thing in the kitchen has doors, and you keep plates and glasses in it.
items.s: We keep the plates and glasses in this ___ in the kitchen.
items.hintDe: Schrank mit Türen, für Teller und Gläser.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 5 (New curtains for the window)

items.d: You pull this in front of the window to keep the light out.
items.s: Close the ___ so the sun is not in my eyes.
items.hintDe: Den ziehst du vor das Fenster.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (The trailers can be connected to electricity and water)

items.d: This power makes your lights and your fridge work.
items.s: We had no ___ in the storm, so the lights and the fridge did not work.
items.hintDe: Damit funktionieren Licht und Kühlschrank.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 7 (a fridge for food)

items.d: This cold machine in the kitchen keeps your food cold.
items.s: We keep the milk and the cheese cold in the ___.
items.hintDe: Hier bleiben Milch und Käse kühl.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (In our house, there's lots of furniture)

items.d: A sofa, a table, beds and chairs are all ___.
items.s: In our building, there is a lot of ___: a sofa, a table and chairs.
items.hintDe: Oberbegriff für Sofa, Tisch, Bett und Stuhl.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (people live in houses that are not on the ground)

items.d: This is what you walk on when you are outside.
items.s: Some homes are high up on stilts, not on the ___.
items.hintDe: Darauf gehst du, wenn du draußen bist.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 7 (Now I have a hammock!); MORE Words and Phrases

items.d: You hang this up and lie in it in the garden.
items.s: I have a new ___. I like to lie in it in the garden.
items.hintDe: Die hängst du auf und liegst darin.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 11 (No. It's hers); grammar (The bag is hers)

items.d: A thing that is a girl's or a woman's.
items.s: This is not my jacket. It is Mum's, so it is ___.
items.hintDe: Es gehört ihr (einer Frau/einem Mädchen).

provenance.sbRef: SB grammar (This is my bed, and that's his)

items.d: A thing that is a boy's or a man's.
items.s: Tom has a green cap. This green cap is ___.
items.hintDe: Es gehört ihm (einem Mann/einem Jungen).

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (fifty floating islands of reeds)

items.d: This is land with water all around it.
items.s: There is a small ___ in the middle of the lake.
items.hintDe: Land mit Wasser rundherum.

provenance.sbRef: WB ex 1 (I = lamp); SB ex 12 (put the lamp on the sofa)

items.d: When it is dark, you put this on and it gives you light.
items.s: Put the ___ on so I can read my book in the dark.
items.hintDe: Die machst du an, wenn es dunkel ist.

provenance.sbRef: SB Twins ex 1 (made of leather); MORE Words and Phrases (She doesn't wear leather shoes ...)

items.d: This material is from animal skin, and we make shoes from it.
items.s: She does not wear ___ shoes because she wants to help animals.
items.hintDe: Material aus Tierhaut, für Schuhe und Taschen.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (What material did they use to build this house?)

items.d: This is what a thing is made of, like cotton or metal.
items.s: What ___ is your school bag made of: cotton, metal or plastic?
items.hintDe: Woraus ein Ding gemacht ist.

provenance.sbRef: SB Twins ex 2 (It's made of metal); MORE Words and Phrases (It's made of metal)

items.d: Keys and a fridge are this heavy, cold material.
items.s: My keys and the fridge are this cold, heavy ___.
items.hintDe: Hartes, kaltes Material wie bei Schlüsseln.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 12 (No, it isn't mine); grammar (It's mine)

items.d: It is my thing.
items.s: This pen is my pen, so it is ___.
items.hintDe: Es gehört mir.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (The Mongolian people have moveable houses)

items.d: When a thing is ___, you can move it from place to place.
items.s: The desk has wheels, so you can move it. It is very ___.
items.hintDe: Man kann es von Ort zu Ort bewegen.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 10 (No, it's ours, but they want to borrow it)

items.d: A thing that is for us.
items.s: This is the dog of our family, so it is ___.
items.hintDe: Es gehört uns.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (The shirt has a striped pattern)

items.d: This is the spots, the stripes or the shapes on a thing.
items.s: My new dress has a ___ of red spots on it.
items.hintDe: Die Punkte oder Streifen auf einem Stoff.

provenance.sbRef: SB Twins ex 2 (so it's plain white, is it?); MORE Words and Phrases (It's plain white)

items.d: It has nothing on it — no spots and no stripes.
items.s: It is ___ white, with no spots and no stripes on it.
items.hintDe: Einfarbig, ohne Punkte oder Streifen.

provenance.sbRef: SB Twins ex 2 (It's made of plastic); MORE Words and Phrases (This bottle is made of plastic)

items.d: Many bottles are this light material, and so are lots of toys.
items.s: This bottle is light because it is made of ___.
items.hintDe: Leichtes Material für Flaschen und Spielsachen.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (She falls in the pond)

items.d: Frogs live in this small water in a garden, smaller than a lake.
items.s: There are frogs in the small ___ in our garden.
items.hintDe: Kleines Gewässer im Garten, kleiner als ein See.

provenance.sbRef: WB ex 1 (C = radiator)

items.d: This metal thing on the wall makes your room hot in the cold days.
items.s: My room is hot because the ___ on the wall is on.
items.hintDe: Das macht das Zimmer im Winter warm.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (fifty floating islands of reeds)

items.d: The Uros people make their homes from this tall, strong grass.
items.s: Fifty homes of ___ float on the lake.
items.hintDe: Hohes, starkes Gras am Wasser, gut zum Hausbau.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (It has a roof, walls, rooms, windows and doors)

items.d: The ___ of a building keeps out the rain.
items.s: Our building has a ___, walls, windows and doors.
items.hintDe: Das ist oben auf dem Haus.

provenance.sbRef: WB ex 1 (K = rug)

items.d: This small thing on the ground is smaller than a carpet, and you walk on it.
items.s: There is a small ___ on the ground in front of my bed.
items.hintDe: Kleiner Teppich, kleiner als ein Teppichboden.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (Take a seat)

items.d: This is a place where you sit down, like a chair.
items.s: There is one free ___ next to me on the sofa.
items.hintDe: Ein Platz zum Sitzen, wie ein Stuhl.

provenance.sbRef: WB ex 1 (F = sink); SB ex 13 (a sink and a fridge)

items.d: The place in the kitchen where you wash the plates and glasses.
items.s: We wash the dirty plates and glasses in the kitchen ___.
items.hintDe: Hier wäschst du das schmutzige Geschirr.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 6/10 (armchair / sofa in the room); WB (D = sofa)

items.d: A long seat for two or three people in the living room.
items.s: My family sits down on the big ___ to watch a film in the living room.
items.hintDe: Langer Sitz für mehrere Leute im Wohnzimmer.

provenance.sbRef: SB Twins (A spotted); MORE Words and Phrases (I can't find my spotted sunglasses)

items.d: It has many small spots on it.
items.s: Her dress has small spots on it, so it is ___.
items.hintDe: Mit vielen kleinen Punkten.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (There might be a staircase)

items.d: You go up and down these steps inside a building.
items.s: Go up the ___ to the bedrooms.
items.hintDe: Darüber gehst du hinauf und hinunter.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (some people in South East Asia build their houses on stilts)

items.d: These are long, strong legs that hold homes up high over the ground.
items.s: Some homes are high up on ___, over the water.
items.hintDe: Lange Beine, die ein Haus hoch über den Boden halten.

provenance.sbRef: SB Twins ex 2 (the strap is different ... it's striped); MORE Words and Phrases (I've got a watch with a blue strap)

items.d: This holds your watch on you, and it can be leather, plastic or metal.
items.s: I've got a watch with a green ___.
items.hintDe: Das Band, das die Uhr an dir hält.

provenance.sbRef: SB Twins ex 2 (It's striped); MORE Words and Phrases (My T-shirt is striped)

items.d: It has long stripes on it.
items.s: His shirt has long stripes on it, so it is ___.
items.hintDe: Mit langen Streifen.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 13 (There's a big table and four chairs)

items.d: This thing has four legs, and you eat your dinner at it.
items.s: We have our dinner at the ___ in the kitchen.
items.hintDe: Daran sitzt du beim Essen.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 10 (No, they're Mike's ... they aren't theirs)

items.d: A thing that is for them.
items.s: These books are for Mum and Dad, so they are ___.
items.hintDe: Es gehört ihnen (mehreren).

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (Fifty islands of reed float on the water)

items.d: When a thing can ___, it stays on the water and does not go down.
items.s: Fifty islands of reed can ___ on the lake.
items.hintDe: Oben auf dem Wasser bleiben, nicht untergehen.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (They can transport their homes)

items.d: To ___ a thing is to move it from one place to another.
items.s: They can ___ their homes to new places.
items.hintDe: Etwas von einem Ort zum anderen bringen.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (Around twenty million Americans live in trailer homes)

items.d: A car can pull this small home on wheels along the road.
items.s: Some people live in a ___ with wheels and pull it from park to park with a car.
items.hintDe: Ein Zuhause mit Rädern, das ein Auto ziehen kann.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (some people live in tree houses)

items.d: Children play up high in this small room over the ground.
items.s: We read our books up in our ___ in the big tree.
items.hintDe: Ein kleines Spielhaus oben in einem Baum.

provenance.sbRef: MORE Words and Phrases (There might be a cellar underneath the house)

items.d: When a thing is under another thing, it is ___ it.
items.s: Our dog likes to lie ___ the table.
items.hintDe: Unter etwas, weiter unten.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 1 (It has a roof, walls, rooms, windows and doors)

items.d: This is the side of a room, and you can put a picture on it.
items.s: There is a poster of my favourite singer on my bedroom ___.
items.hintDe: Die senkrechte Seite eines Zimmers.

provenance.sbRef: WB ex 1 (A = wardrobe)

items.d: A big thing in your bedroom where you keep your clothes.
items.s: I keep all my clothes in the big ___ in my bedroom.
items.hintDe: Hier hängst du deine Kleidung hinein.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 11 (Whose pen is this?); MORE Words and Phrases

items.d: You ask this when you want to find who a thing is for.
items.s: ___ pen is this? Is it yours or mine?
items.hintDe: Fragewort: Wem gehört etwas?

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 13 (There's a big window and we can look into the garden)

items.d: You look out of this to look at the garden.
items.s: Open the ___, please. It is too hot in here.
items.hintDe: Da schaust du nach draußen in den Garten.

provenance.sbRef: SB ex 11 (Whose pen is this? Is it yours?)

items.d: A thing that is for you, not for me.
items.s: This book is for you, so it is ___.
items.hintDe: Es gehört dir.
